criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and breadth of the educational material provided.
criteria.sources: User reviews, educational reviews, content analysis

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Metrics indicating user interaction and retention.
criteria.sources: App analytics, user reviews, engagement metrics from app stores

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance of the app across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App store listings, compatibility checks, user reviews

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique features and innovations introduced by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, tech reviews, innovation awards

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, design, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, UI/UX analyses, app store ratings
